subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis is the Dungeon Master running the session.
source_quote: run by Kostadis as Dungeon Master

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy is the player controlling the character Zenvon.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy as the player controlling the character Zenvon

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon is the character controlled by Nikhil Reddy.
source_quote: player controlling the character Zenvon

subject: Phandalin
fact: The session is set in the town of Phandalin.
source_quote: set in the town of Phandalin

subject: Stonehill Tavern
fact: The party gathered critical intelligence at the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: gathered critical intelligence at the Stonehill Tavern

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands gang was identified as a major threat operating out of Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: Red Brands gang was identified as a major threat operating out of Tresendar Manor

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands gang.
source_quote: with a leader named Glasstaff

subject: mysterious obelisk
fact: A mysterious obelisk connected to psionic magic, minds, memory, and transformation was introduced as a potential larger storyline thread.
source_quote: A mysterious obelisk connected to psionic magic, minds, memory, and transformation was introduced as a potential larger storyline thread

subject: goblins
fact: The party ambushed and defeated two goblins outside a cave.
source_quote: ambushed and defeated two goblins

subject: goblin boss
fact: The party defeated a goblin boss outside a cave.
source_quote: defeated two goblins and a goblin boss

subject: giant poisonous snake
fact: Zenvon came face-to-face with a giant poisonous snake inside the cave.
source_quote: Zenvon coming face-to-face with a giant poisonous snake inside the cave

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren is the patron who had been captured.
source_quote: rescuing their patron, Gundren, who had been captured

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: Tresendar Manor is the location where the Red Brands operate.
source_quote: operating out of Tresendar Manor

subject: ambush
fact: The party successfully ambushed and defeated two goblins and a goblin boss outside a cave.
source_quote: successfully ambushed and defeated two goblins and a goblin boss outside a cave

subject: Toblen Stonehill
fact: Toblen Stonehill is the broad-shouldered young human owner of the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: Toblen Stonehill, the broad-shouldered young human owner of the tavern

subject: Tell Dendar
fact: Tell Dendar was a man killed by the Red Brands in broad daylight.
source_quote: Red Brands had killed a man named Tell Dendar in broad daylight

subject: Sleeping Giant
fact: The Sleeping Giant is a tap house located on Phandalin's Main Street where the Red Brands drink.
source_quote: Red Brands drink at the Sleeping Giant tap house, located on Phandalin's Main Street

subject: Elsa
fact: Elsa is a sharp-eyed dwarf bartender at the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: Elsa, a sharp-eyed dwarf bartender at the Stonehill Tavern

subject: Elsa's sister
fact: Elsa's sister is a scholar in Neverwinter and is the pride of the family.
source_quote: her sister is a scholar in Neverwinter and is the pride of the family

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra is a party NPC whose mentor was Professor Orryn Voss.
source_quote: Veyra (party NPC) noted that her mentor, Professor Orryn Voss

subject: Professor Orryn Voss
fact: Professor Orryn Voss is a mentor who disappeared in Phandalin.
source_quote: Professor Orryn Voss had disappeared in Phandalin

subject: black stone fragments
fact: Professor Orryn Voss came to Phandalin believing there were black stone fragments from a large obelisk.
source_quote: believing there were black stone fragments from a large obelisk

subject: blue candle
fact: A blue candle reacted to obelisk fragments and psionic magic.
source_quote: A blue candle reacted to obelisk fragments and psionic magic

subject: Pip
fact: Pip is a party NPC who mentioned hearing a whisper saying 'returned'.
source_quote: Party NPC Pip mentioned hearing a whisper saying 'returned'

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela felt a chill in her holy symbol.
source_quote: Sister Maela felt a chill in her holy symbol

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath is the orchard keeper and retired adventurer recommended by Elsa.
source_quote: Daran Edermath, the orchard keeper and retired adventurer

subject: Edermath Orchard
fact: Daran Edermath is located at Edermath Orchard.
source_quote: Daran Edermath at Edermath Orchard

subject: Freda
fact: Freda is a slight gnomish woman with silver-streaked hair and round spectacles.
source_quote: Freda, a slight gnomish woman with silver-streaked hair and round spectacles

subject: Halia
fact: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange and is suspected of having a connection to the Red Brands.
source_quote: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange and suggested that anyone wanting to uncover who is behind the criminal activity should start there

subject: Phandalin Miners Exchange
fact: The Phandalin Miners Exchange is where Halia works.
source_quote: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange

subject: Tuck
fact: Tuck is Toblen's nine-year-old son.
source_quote: Tuck, Toblen's nine-year-old son

subject: Carp Alderleaf
fact: Carp Alderleaf is Tuck's friend who discovered a tunnel leading into the woods.
source_quote: friend Carp Alderleaf had discovered a tunnel leading into the woods

subject: Carp's mother
fact: Carp's mother forbade Carp from going near the tunnel.
source_quote: Carp's mother forbade him from going near it

subject: Narth
fact: Narth is an older weathered human man.
source_quote: Narth, an older weathered human man

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele returned to town limping and pale but refused to explain what had happened.
source_quote: Sister Garaele had returned to town limping and pale but refused to explain what had happened

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar is a lean human miner with a dusty gray beard.
source_quote: Lenar, a lean human miner with a dusty gray beard

subject: Harbin Wester
fact: Harbin Wester is the town master who is widely regarded as ineffective.
source_quote: Harbin Wester as the useless town master who hides behind notices and wax seals

subject: notices
fact: Harbin Wester hides behind notices.
source_quote: hides behind notices and wax seals

subject: wax seals
fact: Harbin Wester hides behind wax seals.
source_quote: hides behind notices and wax seals

subject: goblins
fact: Lenar spoke loudly about goblins as a threat to the roads.
source_quote: goblins, bandits, orcs, and the Red Brands

subject: bandits
fact: Lenar spoke loudly about bandits as a threat to the roads.
source_quote: goblins, bandits, orcs, and the Red Brands

subject: orcs
fact: Lenar spoke loudly about orcs as a threat to the roads.
source_quote: goblins, bandits, orcs, and the Red Brands
